design_philosophy: The UI must convey 'the quiet confidence of a well-built ledger system'. This is an enterprise tool for property developers, finance directors, and construction managers. It prioritizes information density, readability, scannability, and trust. Flourishes and animations are minimal; the structure is rigid, data-rich, and clearly demarcated.

background.description: Slate-50 for the main app background to provide contrast against pure white data cards.

text.description: Avoid pure black. Slate-900 provides high contrast for primary text, while Slate-600/500 handles labels and metadata.

brand.description: Using deep slate as the primary 'brand' color. It is authoritative and solid.

fonts.heading: 'Chivo', sans-serif
fonts.instructions: Avoid Inter/Roboto. Chivo provides a solid, grotesque structure for headings. IBM Plex Sans is highly engineered for dense UI. IBM Plex Mono is CRITICAL for financial figures, VAT numbers, Companies House numbers, and dates.

app_shell.sidebar_style: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full border-r border-slate-200 bg-white z-40
app_shell.topbar_style: h-16 border-b border-slate-200 bg-white sticky top-0 z-30 px-8 flex items-center justify-between
app_shell.main_content: ml-64 p-8 max-w-[1600px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-slate-50

spacing_scale.relaxed: p-6 gap-6 md:p-8 md:gap-8 (Main layout sections, section wrappers)

cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-lg shadow-sm overflow-hidden

tables.header: bg-slate-50 border-y border-slate-200 text-xs font-semibold uppercase tracking-wider text-slate-500
tables.alignment: Numbers right-aligned, text left-aligned, status badges center-aligned.

forms.input: flex h-9 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-300 bg-white px-3 py-1 text-sm shadow-sm transition-colors focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-slate-900
forms.label: block text-sm font-medium text-slate-700 mb-1.5

navigation.behavior: 9 of 10 modules disabled for Phase 1. Only 'Entities' is active.

entity_detail_view.layout: Bento grid or vertical stack of distinct cards (Identity, Tax, Addresses, Insurance, Banking, Xero, Notes). Use a 2-column layout on large screens.
entity_detail_view.hierarchy: Parent entity clearly visible at the top as an overline or breadcrumb. Child entities displayed as a dense data table inside the hierarchy card.

formatting.dates: UK format: DD MMM YYYY (e.g., 19 Apr 2026). Displayed using date-fns-tz for Europe/London.

patterns.testing: CRITICAL: 'data-testid' must be present on EVERY interactive element (buttons, links, inputs, rows, tabs).

interaction_and_motion.hover: Subtle background shifts (slate-50) or border darkening. No heavy scaling or bouncing.
interaction_and_motion.focus: Clear, accessible focus rings (ring-2 ring-slate-900 ring-offset-2).
interaction_and_motion.validation: Inline validation on blur for forms. Red borders and text helper below the input.
interaction_and_motion.loading: Skeleton loaders (animate-pulse bg-slate-200) matching the exact dimensions of the expected content. No generic spinners for main views.

media_and_assets.icons: lucide-react. Standardize stroke-width to 1.5 for a clean, technical look.

auth_background.description: Minimalist black and white low angle view of Brutalist architecture. Use as a split-screen login background (if applicable).

empty_state_pattern.description: Abstract blueprint lines. Use at 5% opacity overlaid on slate-50 background for empty states to prevent stark white voids.

brand_palette.usage_notes: Teal for primary CTAs, focus rings, and links. Orange for selective accent (critical alerts, primary action callouts). Slate system in `colors` block remains the dominant neutral palette per Swiss/B2B ledger archetype. Final reconciliation in Track 8 designer engagement.

shadcn_customizations.button: Remove extreme rounded corners (use rounded-md). Ensure primary button is slate-900.
shadcn_customizations.badge: Customize variants for semantic status (active, dormant, struck_off) and insurance urgency.
shadcn_customizations.card: Remove default extreme shadow. Use border-slate-200 and shadow-sm.
